name: IMA Tech
summary: PART I Business Overview IMA Tech (the Company) was formed on March 29, 2023 in the State of Wyoming. The primary focus of the Company is on the development and deployment of digital avatars. Utilizing advanced technology, the Company creates a unique blend of human intelligence, artificial intelligence, and niche databases.
